manifest.name: Accordion File View

name: Accordion File View

releases.author: cazzek
releases.description:
## Accordion File View v0.1.1

Fixes Community Portal automated review issues.

### Changes
- Use `Setting.setHeading()` for settings UI consistency
- Require Obsidian 1.7.2+ (`revealLeaf` API)
- Release assets: only `manifest.json`, `main.js`, and `styles.css` (no `versions.json`)
- Code quality updates (MarkdownRenderer.render, command ID/name, etc.)

### Compatibility
- Obsidian **1.7.2+**

releases.author: cazzek
releases.description:
## Accordion File View v0.1.0

Initial community release.

### Features
- Accordion-style list to preview notes/files
- Filter by file name or path
- Optional folder scope (blank = whole vault)
- Markdown preview rendering
- Optional .txt preview
- Ribbon icon and command palette command to open the view

### Compatibility
- Obsidian **1.5.0+**

### Install
After installing the plugin, open **Accordion File View** from:
- Ribbon icon, or
- Command palette: **Open Accordion File View**
